    <item>
      <title>Clippers make NBA history with remarkable turnaround</title>
      <description>A team that started the season with big expectations and a veteran group of future Hall of Famers finishing as the No. 9 seed is disappointing. However, the Clippers even being in the play-in tournament is actually an historic turn around based on where they were early in the season. </description>
      <pubDate>13 Apr 2026 23:01:08 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/clippers_make_nba_history_with_remarkable_turnaround/s1_13132_43722724</link>

      </media:content>

      <category>Los Angeles Clippers</category>

    <item>
      <title>Hawks choose first-round matchup with Knicks on season's final day</title>

    <item>
      <title>'Two cerebral basketball players': Lakers' LeBron James addresses connection with Luke Kennard</title>
      <description>The real story centered on the connection between James and Kennard, a pairing that continues to develop as the Lakers navigate through roster limitations.</description>
      <pubDate>13 Apr 2026 11:35:34 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/two_cerebral_basketball_players_lakers_lebron_james_addresses_connection_with_luke_kennard/s1_13132_43714604</link>
